beats.action: Dust rises from the jagged lip of the Scarred Gorge. Lyra stands poised on a narrow precipice, her white robes snapping in the howling wind. She holds her steel blade perfectly level.
beats.camera: Wide shot, showing Lyra against the gorge, wind effects

beats.action: With an explosive burst of movement, Lyra lunges. Her blade cleaves the air, leaving a shimmering arc of pure qi.
beats.camera: Medium shot, tracking Lyra's movement, emphasizing the qi arc

beats.action: The qi arc shears a massive stone pillar cleanly in two. The severed rock slides into the abyss with a dull roar.
beats.camera: Close-up on the pillar splitting, then tilt down following the falling rock

beats.action: Lyra sheathes her weapon with a sharp, metallic click. Her expression hardens slightly.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Lyra's hand and waist as she sheathes the blade, then push in on her face

dialogue.text: A shadow crawls through the lower depths. Not with the roar of a true cultivator, but the quiet, filthy hiss of venom.

beats.action: Lyra pulls a crumpled missive from her sash.
beats.camera: Close-up on Lyra's hands as she retrieves the missive

beats.action: Her sharp eyes scan the messy ink on the missive, which details a strongman's ruin through poison and deception.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Lyra's face, then cut to an insert shot of the missive's text

dialogue.text: No direct challenge. No test of spirit.

beats.action: Lyra's expression fills with rising fury as she processes the report's implications.
beats.camera: Medium close-up, slow push in on Lyra's face

dialogue.text: They whisper his name as if he achieved something grand. Kaelen. A parasite cloaked in the guise of a victor.

beats.action: She tightens her fist around the missive. A brilliant flare of pristine white qi erupts from her palm.
beats.camera: Close-up on Lyra's hand as qi erupts

beats.action: The parchment incinerates instantly. The ashes scatter into the howling wind.
beats.camera: Extreme close-up on the burning parchment, then wider shot as ashes scatter

beats.action: Lyra stands resolute, looking out over the gorge, her conviction unwavering.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Lyra, slight low angle, emphasizing her resolve

dialogue.text: Let him climb his mountain of schemes. The higher he rises, the further he will fall when he meets a true blade.

beats.action: Lyra's gaze hardens, the wind whipping her robes around her.
beats.camera: Wide shot, Lyra on the precipice, wind effects, slow zoom out

dialogue.text: I will not allow this rot to fester.
